topics.title: Gen Z marriage rates hit all-time lows while platonic co-living goes viral
topics.summary: Only 10% of 18-27 year olds are currently married. Median first marriage age hit 30+ for men. 44% cite financial readiness as the #1 barrier. Meanwhile #PlatonicLifePartner has 13.5M TikTok views and a video about getting divorced and moving in with a best friend hit 9.9M views.
topics.angle: Gen Z is already structurally doing lavender marriage — shared finances, chosen family, life partnership without romance. They just won't call it that until someone gives them the vocabulary.

topics.title: Adam22 celebrated his own divorce on social media
topics.summary: Lena the Plug filed for divorce on June 1, 2026. Adam22 responded by reposting the TMZ article about the split with a message asking Black women interested in dating him to DM him — effectively turning his divorce announcement into a dating ad within hours.
topics.angle: This is peak 'romantic partnership collapsing in real time on the internet' content. The chaos of performative romantic partnership. LLMA: what if you built something that didn't require anyone to publicly collapse when it ended?

topics.title: Summer House Season 11 casting is uncertain after the Amanda/West/Ciara fallout
topics.summary: Bravo's VP of Current Production confirmed in early June 2026 that Season 11 casting is still unresolved. 'We're still figuring out the cast' — the Amanda Batula/West Wilson/Ciara Miller love triangle created so much collateral relationship damage that the entire show's cast is in flux.
topics.angle: When romantic partnership drama is so explosive it collapses not just the couple but the entire social structure around them — that's the design flaw LLMA keeps flagging. Intentional partnership design asks the hard questions before you're on a Bravo couch.

pop_culture_hook: Adam22 literally turned his divorce announcement into a Tinder bio. Gen Z watched, nodded, and went back to planning their platonic co-living arrangements.
